sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109950" key="u(yi/domos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑψῐ´-δομος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109950.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">high-built,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πύλαι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4081.tlg001.perseus-grc1:391" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Coluth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">391</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
